meta.description: Live disruptions and mega-block schedule for Mumbai Suburban Railways

disruptions.title: Western Line Mega Block
disruptions.message: Mega block on Western Line between Borivali and Virar every Sunday 00:00–05:00. Plan alternate travel.

disruptions.title: Central Line Mega Block
disruptions.message: Mega block on Central Line between Thane and Kalyan every Sunday 00:00–06:00. Limited services via Harbour Line.

disruptions.title: Signal Failure – Harbour Line
disruptions.message: Signal failure near Mankhurd causing 10–15 min delays on Harbour Line. Trains running behind schedule.

disruptions.title: Track Maintenance – Virar to Dahanu
disruptions.message: Track maintenance work between Virar and Dahanu Road on weekday nights 01:00–04:00. No trains running.
disruptions.alternate_mode: ST Bus services from Virar ST Stand

disruptions.title: Heavy Crowding – Morning Rush
disruptions.message: Extreme crowding on Western Line fast trains 07:30–09:30. Consider taking slow trains or travelling earlier.

western.note: AC trains may have separate schedule

central.note: Trans-Harbour trains unaffected (TODO: add dedicated Trans-Harbour mega-block entries when CR publishes them)
